text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to hear a gloomy voice coming from the
back of the school building as I'm walking by.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hoho? Hehe... are you in need of
Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru?!

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
You heard that right... I've got a new name. My
motivation, my energy, my luck... it's all gone...

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki did say, "The more you run,
the more possibilities will come upon you." But...
all this running has only made me all weak and
floppy.

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
None of my spells or prayers are working. I don't
know what to do anymore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running back-to-back races recently is taking its
toll on her. I'd better adjust her race schedule...
